description_long: This is an adult male figure with a full beard and medium-length hair, dressed in a fitted, formal outfit. The attire consists of a buttoned jacket, matching trousers, and a collared shirt, all tailored closely to the body. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are open with fingers slightly apart. The shoes are formal and streamlined, complementing the overall business-like appearance. The facial features are well-defined, with a serious expression and neatly groomed hair. The figure stands upright, exuding a composed and professional demeanor.
description: A bearded adult male in a formal, fitted suit with arms extended horizontally, standing upright with a composed expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, beard, and the detailed front of the formal outfit with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the contour of the jacket, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, jacket, and trousers, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the side seam of the outfit, and the formal shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and formal jacket
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with full beard
